summary: LUCCCA Enterprise Framework Iteration 5 - Comprehensive testing of vendor ordering (replacing table ordering), on-hand inventory with stock tracking, and module stability. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Vendor Ordering with 5 vendors, inventory items with stock indicators, cart functionality; On-Hand Inventory with stats, sortable table, detail panel with transaction history. Module stability confirmed - no Loading flicker when switching sections. Sidebar starts collapsed (icon-only) as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Vendor ordering: 5 vendors seeded (Sysco, US Foods, Performance, Restaurant Depot, Local Farms)
Vendor order creation generates PO numbers (PO-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX format)
Vendor order delivery updates inventory stock levels correctly
On-hand inventory: 11 items with realistic stock levels and costs (~$2,415 total value)
On-hand inventory detail panel shows transaction history (receiving, consume)
Invoice-to-inventory pipeline: fuzzy matching works, creates transactions, updates stock
No Loading flicker when switching sections within module - FIXED
seed_data_creation: Test vendor orders created during testing, inventory transactions recorded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 fully tested. Backend: Vendor ordering APIs working (vendors, vendor-orders, status updates with inventory integration). On-hand inventory APIs working (on-hand, history). Invoice-to-inventory pipeline working. Table ordering endpoints REMOVED (404). Frontend: Ordering & Inventory module loads without crashing. Vendor Ordering section shows 5 vendors as pills, inventory items with stock %, par levels, prices, LOW indicators, cart functionality. On-Hand Inventory section shows stats (11 items, $2,415 value, 8 low stock), sortable table, detail panel with transaction history. Module sidebar starts collapsed. No Loading flicker when switching sections.

vendor_ordering_section.shows_5_vendors: PASS - Local Farms, Performance, Restaurant Depot, Sysco, US Foods
vendor_ordering_section.vendor_info_display: PASS - category, payment terms, delivery days, min order
vendor_ordering_section.inventory_items_display: PASS - 11 items with stock %, par, prices
vendor_ordering_section.cart_total: PASS - shows subtotal and min order requirement

on_hand_inventory_section.stats_bar: PASS - 11 Total Items, $2,415.13 On-Hand Value, 8 Low Stock
on_hand_inventory_section.sortable_table: PASS - Item, On Hand, PAR, Stock %, Value columns
on_hand_inventory_section.detail_panel: PASS - shows On Hand, Par Level, Unit Cost, On-Hand Value, Stock Level, Last Vendor, Last Received
on_hand_inventory_section.transaction_history: PASS - shows receiving (+) and consume (-) transactions with timestamps

module_stability.no_loading_flicker: PASS - 0 Loading indicators when switching sections

mocked_apis_list: /api/tts/speak - Returns audio: null, message: TTS not configured
